data.title: Cube Co-Founder Supports Solana Improvement Proposal
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cube co-founder Bartosz Lipinski expressed his support for the SIMD-0228 improvement proposal. Lipinski emphasized the need for Solana to adopt market-based emissions rather than arbitrary inflation. He argued that the current fixed schedule leads to imbalances, with high inflation negatively impacting the active use of SOL in DeFi and diminishing value for non-stakers. Lipinski suggested that a dynamic model, adjusted based on staking rates, could create a better balance, enhancing both network security and capital efficiency.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $614 Million Liquidation in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $614 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $537 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw $76.81 million liquidated. Bitcoin led the liquidations with $232 million, followed by Ethereum with $111 million.

data.title: If Bitcoin falls below $80,000, the cumulative long order liquidation intensity of mainstream CEX will reach 169 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coinglass data, if Bitcoin falls below $80,000, the cumulative long order liquidation strength of mainstream CEX will reach 169 million.
Conversely, if Bitcoin breaks through $83,000, the cumulative short order liquidation strength of mainstream CEX will reach 469 million.
BlockBeats Note: The liquidation chart does not show the exact number of contracts to be liquidated or the exact value of the contracts to be liquidated. The columns on the liquidation chart actually show the importance of each liquidation cluster relative to the adjacent liquidation clusters, that is, the strength.
Therefore, the liquidation chart shows the extent to which the underlying price will be affected when it reaches a certain position. A higher "liquidation column" means that the price will react more strongly to the liquidity wave after it arrives.

data.title: A whale accurately shorted BTC, with unrealized profits exceeding $7.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale has performed excellent shorting operations in the recent BTC price fluctuations, with a cumulative unrealized profit of more than $7.5 million. The investor shorted BTC at about $96,500 on February 22. Within a week, BTC fell below $80,000, and then perfectly closed the position at a low of about $78,900. After the release of Trump's executive order, BTC soared to more than $94,000, and he accurately re-shorted at a high of about $94,424. At present, the investor has set up a new short position in the range of $92,449-92,636, and set a profit-taking order in the range of $70,475-74,192.

data.title: Elon Musk's GSAi Chatbot Deployed for Government Automation
data.description:
According to PANews, Elon Musk's company DOGE has launched its custom chatbot, GSAi, within the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA) to automate government tasks. The tool assists employees in drafting emails, preparing speech points, summarizing texts, and coding, as well as analyzing contracts and procurement data.

GSAi offers three AI model options: Claude Haiku 3.5 (default), Claude Sonnet 3.5 v2, and Meta Llama 3.2. Currently, the tool is available to approximately 1,500 employees, with plans for broader implementation in the future. Users are instructed not to input federal non-public information, personal identity information, or controlled unclassified information.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Potential On-Chain Liquidation Of $128 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that Ethereum is facing a potential on-chain liquidation amounting to $128 million at the price point of $1,919.266. The majority of this liquidation is associated with the MakerDAO protocol, accounting for $127.8 million.

data.title: Apex Fintech Considers Acquiring Bakkt Amid Rising Market Interest
data.description: According to Odaily, Apex Fintech, a fintech company specializing in integrating stock trading into applications, is contemplating the acquisition of Bakkt, a cryptocurrency platform initially spun off by Intercontinental Exchange (ICE). This potential acquisition comes two years after Bakkt acquired Apex's crypto business for up to $200 million, a deal seemingly influenced by strict regulations under the Biden administration. Following the report by Axios, Bakkt's stock price surged approximately 15% in early trading, reaching $14.86, drawing significant market attention.

data.title: South Korea Considers Bitcoin For National Reserve And Stablecoin Development
data.description: According to Foresight News, South Korean financial experts and opposition party members have proposed incorporating Bitcoin into the national reserve and developing a stablecoin backed by the Korean won. The seminar aimed to analyze potential strategies in response to the United States' Bitcoin-centric national reserve initiatives. Kim Jong-seung, CEO of blockchain company xCrypton, emphasized the need for South Korea to respond with clear policies during an event preceding U.S. President Donald Trump's executive order announcement.
